metrics.label: Retrieval Latency (BM25)
metrics.detail: In-memory BM25 keyword index, 239 docs, 9401 terms (streaming path)

metrics.label: Retrieval Latency (Dense)
metrics.detail: Zhipu embedding-2 API + Chroma search (sync path only)

metrics.label: TTFT (Uncached Streaming)
metrics.detail: BM25 retrieval ~10ms + DeepSeek v4-flash 首次 token ~300ms

metrics.label: Total Streaming Latency
metrics.detail: BM25 retrieval + DeepSeek v4-flash streaming, 50ms SSE buffer

metrics.label: Total Cached Latency
metrics.detail: 内存缓存直接返回, 无 LLM 调用

metrics.label: Full RAG Latency (Sync)
metrics.detail: 非流式, Zhipu embedding + single LLM call baseline (dense path)

metrics.label: LLM Calls per Query
metrics.detail: 优化前3次(intent+rag+generate), 优化后1次

metrics.label: Cache Layer
metrics.detail: 内存 TTL=3600s, max 500 entries, LRU evict

services.cache: In-memory dict + Redis + BM25 query embedding cache
services.embedding_api: Zhipu embedding-2 (sync path only, streaming path uses BM25)
